channel.title: Panda Express on WithinTrend — Part-Time Job Reviews & Guides

item.title: Working at Panda Express on the Front Counter: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: A complete guide to the Panda Express front counter service team member position, with real employee insights on pay, tasks, and work experience.

item.title: Working at Panda Express in the Kitchen: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: Everything you need to know about working as a kitchen team member at Panda Express, from pay and responsibilities to honest pros and cons.
